---
id: submit-redirect-payment-method
title: "Submit redirect payment method"
description: "Submit the payment method customer has selected on the SDK and in return get the PG url where the user can be redirected to perform the payment."
sidebar_label: "Submit redirect payment method"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Submit redirect payment method"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/checkout/api/sdk/v1/submit/{session_id}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Submit the payment method customer has selected on the SDK and in return get the PG url where the user can be redirected to perform the payment.
